Package org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms

Class SimpleTerm

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.Hashable
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms.Term
org.eventb.internal.pp.core.elements.terms.SimpleTerm
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Term>
Direct Known Subclasses:
Constant, LocalVariable, Variable
public abstract class SimpleTerm extends Term
Abstract base class for simple terms.
